cards.rules_text:
Flying, lifelink
When Port Pearl Flagship enters, create two 1/1 colorless Thopter creature tokens with flying.
Whenever Port Pearl Flagship attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures you control.
Crew 2

[+2]: Create an Incursion token. [i](It's a battle with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.”)[/i]
[+1]: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn.
[-2]: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
[-8]: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying, vigilance, and lifelink until end of turn.
cards.special_text:
[+2]: Create an Incursion token. [i](It's a battle with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.”)[/i]
[+1]: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn.
[-2]: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
[-8]: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying, vigilance, and lifelink until end of turn.

cards.rules_text:
Flying, vigilance
When Valus Harbor Flagship enters, draw two cards, then discard a card.
Whenever Valus Harbor Flagship attacks, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it.
Crew 2

Abyssal Scuttler enters tapped with seven stun counters on it.
Whenever another Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, remove a stun counter from Abyssal Scuttler. When you do, tap up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls, then put a stun counter on that permanent.

Menace, lifelink
When Onyx Armada Flagship enters, target opponent exiles a creature they control unless they exile a nonland card from their hand.
Whenever Onyx Armada Flagship attacks, defending player loses life equal to the greatest mana value among permanents they control.
Crew 2

Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
Whenever a creature token you control dies, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

Menace, trample
When Sun Fleet Flagship enters, it deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
Whenever Sun Fleet Flagship attacks, it deals 1 damage to each creature and planeswalker defending player controls.
Crew 2

Creatures you control have haste.
{T}, Sacrifice a creature: Livewire Trebuchet deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target. Activate only during your turn.

Vigilance, trample
When Verdigris Reef Flagship enters, mill five cards, then put a land card milled this way onto the battlefield tapped.
Whenever Verdigris Reef Flagship attacks, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
Crew 2

Lands, artifacts, and creatures you control have “{T}: Add one mana of any color.”
At the beginning of your end step, if there are five colors among spells you cast this turn, draw a card and you gain 5 life.

First mate — Creature cards in your starting deck have total mana value 80 or greater. [i](If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a creature spell, if it doesn't share a name with a creature you control, draw a card.

First mate — Your starting deck contains an artifact card with each mana value among 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5. [i](If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.)[/i]
At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may put an artifact card with mana value 5 or less from your hand onto the battlefield. If it's a Vehicle, it gains haste. Put it on the bottom of your library at end of combat. If you do, draw a card.

First mate — Your starting deck contains at least thirteen creature cards and at least thirteen instant and/or sorcery cards. [i](If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.)[/i]
If another source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead.

First mate — Each creature card in your starting deck is a Zombie card. [i](If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.)[/i]
Other Zombies you control get +1/+1.
During each of your turns, you may cast one Zombie spell from your graveyard.

First mate — Your starting deck contains exactly 88 cards. [i](If this card outside the game is your chosen first mate, you may swap it with a card in your opening hand.)[/i]
At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control has base power and toughness 8/8 until end of turn.
{8}: Draw three cards.
All damage that would be dealt to you and other permanents you control is dealt to Platinum Imperator instead.

Creatures you control dying cause abilities of that creature to trigger as though that creature entered.
You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, exile target nonland permanent.
You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, each opponent loses 5 life and you gain 5 life.
Return up to two target creature cards each with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
cards.special_text:
Creatures you control dying cause abilities of that creature to trigger as though that creature entered.
You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, exile target nonland permanent.
You may sacrifice a creature. When you do, each opponent loses 5 life and you gain 5 life.
Return up to two target creature cards each with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.rules_text:
Flying, haste
Whenever Molten Brass Dragon attacks, it innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)[/i]
Whenever you play a card from exile, if it's a land, you gain 3 life. Otherwise, Molten Brass Dragon deals 3 damage to any target.

Flying
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1.
Vehicles you control with crew 1 are artifact creatures.

As Crain enters, for each opponent, create a black Aura Curse enchantment token attached to that player. It has enchant player and “Whenever enchanted player draws a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to them.”
[+2]: Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card.
[-2]: Destroy target creature. Its controller may draw a card.
[-3]: Each player may discard their hand, then draw five cards.
cards.special_text:
As Crain enters, for each opponent, create a black Aura Curse enchantment token attached to that player. It has enchant player and “Whenever enchanted player draws a card, this enchantment deals 1 damage to them.”
[+2]: Draw a card. Each opponent discards a card.
[-2]: Destroy target creature. Its controller may draw a card.
[-3]: Each player may discard their hand, then draw five cards.

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
If an ability of a Vehicle you controls triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.
Crew 2

When Marbled Custodian enters, create a colorless Construct artifact creature token with “This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of artifacts you control.”
At the beginning of your end step, if an artifact you control entered this turn, you gain 2 life and surveil 1.

Flying
When Dashing Freebooter enters, create an Incursion token. [i](It's a battle with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.”)[/i]
If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

When Port Aurora Bureaucrat enters, create two 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature tokens with flying.
{T}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

When Buoyant Cloudgazer enters, search your library for a Vehicle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Legendary spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

Whenever a spell or ability an opponent controls causes them to sacrifice one or more nonland permanents or an opponent sacrifices a nonland permanent while paying a cost, draw a card.
At the beginning of your end step, exile all graveyards.

Flying, agile [i](This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.)[/i]
Whenever a Vehicle you control attacks, create a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying that's tapped and attacking.
Crew 3

Flash
Flying
Whenever you draw a card, Florence innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)[/i]

Flying, vigilance
When Jubilant Skyskipper enters, put target nonland permanent an opponent controls into its owner's library just beneath the top X cards of that library, where X is the number of creatures you control with flying.

Other Merfolk you control get +1/+1.
Whenever you attack with three or more Merfolk, add an 8/8 blue Kraken creature token to your bestiary. [i](If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)[/i]

Whenever Silversea Archfiend enters or attacks, you may cast an instant or sorcery card with mana value 5 or less from your hand or graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.
When Silversea Archfiend dies, add a token copy of Silversea Archfiend to your bestiary. [i](If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)[/i]

Enchant creature you control
At the beginning of your end step, add a token copy of enchanted creature to your bestiary. [i](If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)[/i]

Exile up to two target creatures you control, then return them to the battlefield under their owners' control. Each of those creatures innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)[/i]

When Crain's Soulchaser enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
Whenever Crain's Soulchaser attacks, create a token that's a copy of target nonartifact creature you control except it has decayed.
Crew 3

Whenever you attack, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a Cog token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.”)[/i]
{T}: Target opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.
Crew 1

When Moldin' Retreiver enters, surveil 2.
{B}: Exile target card from a graveyard. If you exiled a creature card this way, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]

When Captain Krenshaw Teach enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw a card.
{B}, {T}: Exile target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature, and it has “This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.” Activate only as a sorcery.

[i]Raid[/i] — At the beginning of your end step, reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value. If you attacked this turn, instead each opponent loses life equal to that card's mana value.

Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.
[i]Raid[/i] — If you attacked this turn, you may cast a card with mana value 3 or less from your hand by paying life equal to its mana value rather than paying its mana cost.

Creature spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.
Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, put a decayed counter on it. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]

Lurching Lubber can't block.
If you would create a Zombie creature token, you may instead return Lurching Lubber from your graveyard to the battlefield.

Menace, haste
Whenever Madcap Cannoneer deals combat damage to a player, exile the top card of that player's library. As long as Madcap Cannoneer is tapped, you may play that card from exile, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

Whenever Giz-Whiz Gremlins attacks, you may discard your hand. If you discarded one or more cards this way, Giz-Whiz Gremlins innovates three times. [i](Exile the top three cards of your library face down. You may look at them at any time, and you may play them at any time this creature is tapped.)[/i]
You may cast innovated spells as though they have flash.

When Veteran Calibrator enters, create a Cog token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.”)[/i]
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a Cog.
Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of that card. When you do, if you paid this spell's additional cost, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

Whenever Horizon Line Frigate or another Vehicle you control enters, if you cast it from your hand, discover 3. [i](Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 3 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
Crew 2

At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature you control innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time that creature is tapped.)[/i]
{T}: Blast Furnace deals 2 damage to any target.

Haste
Whenever Tradewinds Tracer becomes crewed by creatures with total power 4 or greater, it becomes a 4/4 Dragon with flying until end of turn.
Crew 1. Activate only once each turn.

Enchant creature or Vehicle you control
Enchanted permanent gets +10/+10 and is a Vehicle artifact with crew 3 and it loses all other card types.

[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, create an Incursion token. [i](It's a battle with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.”)[/i]

When Anomalgae enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls. If you do, its controller creates a 2/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with flying and crew 1.
Whenever an artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Anomalgae.

When Kanta enters, create a Cog token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.”)[/i]
{1}{G}, {T}: You may put a creature or Vehicle card from your hand onto the battlefield.

Challenge [i](This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.)[/i]
Other Krakens, Leviathans, Octopi, and Serpents you control have challenge.

Whenever you create a token, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{4}{G}{G}: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

Whenever The Hollow Colossus attacks, you may sacrifice a creature that crewed it this turn. If you do, search your library for a creature card with mana value equal to the 1 plus sacrificed creature's mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
Crew 1

When Pearl Isle Sirens enters, add a 3/3 white Whale creature token with flying to your bestiary. [i](If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)[/i]
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.

Flash
Flying
When H.S.S. Tempest enters, exile up to one target creature an opponent controls, then create a token that's a copy of that permanent except it has decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
Crew 4

When Deepbrine Trawler enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. [i](It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)[/i]
{T}, Sacrifice three other creatures: You gain 3 life and draw a card. Each opponent loses 3 life, then sacrifices a creature unless they discard a card.
Return each nontoken creature to its owner's hand, then each player discards two cards.

[i]Raid[/i] — At the beginning of your end step, you may discard a card. If you do, exile cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. If you attacked this turn, you may cast that card without paying its mana cost. If you don't, put it into your hand.

Menace
You may cast Greaseworks Automaton from your graveyard by sacrificing a creature in addition to its other costs. If you do, when Greaseworks Automaton enters, it innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)[/i]

Vigilance, haste
{T}: Target land you control becomes a 4/4 Elemental creature with haste until end of turn. It's still a land.

Whenever Pentech Welder attacks, create a Cog token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.”)[/i]
Sacrifice five Cogs: Pentech Welder deals 5 damage to any target.

Vigilance
When New Charter Commodore enters, create an Incursion token. [i](It's a battle with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.”)[/i]
Whenever you put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Flying
Whenever Coquille attacks while saddled, put two +1/+1 counters on another target attacking creature you control. That creature gains flying until end of turn.
Saddle 2

Menace, deathtouch
Whenever Schematic Prodigy deals combat damage to a player, they lose life equal to the number of artifacts you control and you gain that much life.

Flying, lifelink
When Bandit's Cloudcutter enters, each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest.
Crew 3

When Sea Queen's Conch enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token with “{T}: Add {G}.”
{2}, {T}: Mill two cards. When you do, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only if you created a token this turn.

When Rancorous Puppeteer enters, create a Cog token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this artifact: Add {T}.”)[/i]
{1}, {T}: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

Whenever a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control enters, draw a card.
{T}: Target Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control gains hexproof until end of turn.
Add eight 8/8 blue Kraken creature tokens to your bestiary. [i](If you would create a creature token, you may instead put one into play from your bestiary.)[/i]

Haste
{T}: Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

At the beginning of your second main phase, target creature you control innovates. [i](Exile the top card of your library face down. You may look at it at any time, and you may play it at any time this creature is tapped.)[/i]

Other creatures you control get +1/+0.
Exhaust — {4}{R}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on The Glory of Port Rose. It deals damage to any target equal to the number of creatures you control and you gain that much life. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]
